title: Double Exposure Poster AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable semantic typography concept poster with controlled variables while preserving the source prompt's visual recipe. theme: A reusable semantic typography concept poster built around FREEDOM. signature elements: the readable word, its semantic metaphor, and the custom letterform structure are the core visual product transformation rule: change the word and semantic metaphor while keeping the design logic that makes the word itself become the image semantic mood: boundary opening and gravity disappearing. visual metaphor: letters expanding beyond a precise frame. type structure: wide custom sans-serif with stretched negative space. composition: stable composition, clear focal subject, organized supporting elements, balanced negative space, and no clutter. style: High-end semantic typography and editorial graphic design, with the word itself carrying the metaphor through custom readable letterform structure. restrictions: no watermark, no random extra text, no distorted anatomy, no copied copyrighted composition, avoid real logos and replace brands with fictional or generic marks when publishing subject: FREEDOM as the primary visual subject, kept clear and recognizable while the template style remains stable typography: FREEDOM must be the dominant readable visual subject; all supporting elements serve the word and its semantic metaphor. Keep the visual style consistent with the template while changing only the listed variables.
